topic.what: quantifying unintentional information disclosure in arXiv preprint source files across three dimensions: dangling files, metadata, and comments
topic.how: large-scale automated analysis of 2.7M arXiv submissions using AST-based parsing and exiftool for precise detection of hidden information
topic.why_matters: 88% of papers expose hidden sensitive data including API keys, internal document links, and complete Git histories enabling potential exploitation of authors and institutions

characteristics.what_it_measures: percentage of arXiv submissions containing at least one type of hidden information
characteristics.context: affects vast majority despite arXiv warnings and available cleaning tools

characteristics.what_it_measures: total unused files bundled with submissions

characteristics.context: 90% contain modification timestamps from archive upload
644M total comments, 114M after filtering for uniqueness

characteristics.what_it_measures: submissions with sensitive content like API keys/passwords
characteristics.context: includes config files with API keys (2774 submissions) and complete Git repos (74 submissions)

characteristics.what_it_measures: hidden information prevalence in A*-ranked security papers vs others
characteristics.context: A* papers contain significantly MORE hidden information despite security community awareness

characteristics.what_it_measures: reduction in hidden information achieved by proposed tool
characteristics.context: outperforms existing tools by minimizing false negatives and false positives simultaneously

good_for: detecting information disclosure in latex sources
understanding scale of arxiv source file risks
identifying sensitive content patterns in academic papers

novelty: first large-scale analysis of 2.7M arxiv submissions for hidden information disclosure
AST-based parsing approach for precise latex comment detection vs regex heuristics
ALC-NG tool achieving 90% mitigation vs incomplete existing cleaners
empirical evidence that security researchers expose MORE hidden data
open_problems: ensuring long-term adoption of sanitization tools by authors
impact assessment on open science and reproducibility
detection of rare latex csname comment constructions
scalable real-time notification system for affected authors
effectiveness of responsible disclosure campaigns over time
